title: Cloud Security Policy
scenario: Create a cloud security policy for an organization with cloud-based infrastructure. The policy should include cloud security controls, data classification, and access controls. The document should be written in a formal tone and be no more than 5 pages in length. Assume the organization has a mix of cloud and on-premises infrastructure.
constraints: Use a standard cloud security framework
Include at least 3 cloud security controls

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the policy adhere to a standard cloud security framework?
Are at least 3 cloud security controls included?
Is the document written in a formal tone?
